common.tagline: AI-Powered Surgical Video Recording & Learning System

hero.title: AI Surgical Glasses
hero.subtitle: Intelligent Surgical Video Learning Platform
hero.description: Turn every surgery into a high-quality teaching resource. AI automatically transcribes, segments, annotates, and generates lesson plans — zero burden for surgeons, anytime learning for trainees.

autoRecord.title: Zero-Burden Auto Recording
autoRecord.desc: Put on AI glasses, surgery records automatically. No extra steps, no workflow disruption.

aiTeaching.title: AI Auto Lesson Generation
aiTeaching.desc: Teaching materials generated within 30 minutes post-op: summaries, step breakdowns, key moment markers. Surgeons review in just 5 minutes.

interactive.title: Interactive AI Learning
interactive.desc: Trainees can pause and ask questions anytime. AI teaching assistant answers based on video content instantly.

legal.title: Legal Protection Shield
legal.desc: Complete surgical video records serve as the strongest evidence for malpractice defense.

painPoints.title: Surgeon Pain Points
painPoints.quality: Handheld recordings have poor, shaky quality
painPoints.adoption: Recording workflows are cumbersome, nobody remembers
painPoints.access: Teaching resources can't be searched or interacted with

stats.title: Taiwan Surgery Crisis
stats.criminal: 79% of malpractice suits are criminal cases
stats.shortage: Critical surgeon shortage across 5 major specialties

upload.title: Upload Surgical Video
